title: lepisorus macrocarpa
intro: Lepisorus macrocarpa, also known as the Chinese shield fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepisorus macrocarpa are said to include lowering blood pressure, improving respiratory health, and reducing inflammation. Lepisorus macrocarpa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule for its medicinal purposes.
